    IWithExtendedContext<CTX> - Interface in com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.structure
    Implement this and use StructureUtility.withContext(IStructureElement) in case you need to record some temporary states that don't need to live in your main context, which would usually live for the whole lifetime of the structure than just during structure check.

    K

    Key API class outline - Section in Overview
     

    L

    lazy(Function) - Static method in class com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.structure.StructureUtility
    This will defer the actual instantiation of structure element until the first time structure code is actually called.
    lazy(Supplier) - Static method in class com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.structure.StructureUtility
    Similar to defer, but caches the first returned element returned and won't call it again.
    Legacy - Enum constant in enum class com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.structure.AutoPlaceEnvironment.APILevel
    Implements AutoPlaceEnvironment.getChatter(), AutoPlaceEnvironment.getActor() and AutoPlaceEnvironment.getSource().
    LegacyRelaxed - Enum constant in enum class com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.structure.AutoPlaceEnvironment.APILevel
    Implements AutoPlaceEnvironment.getChatter(), AutoPlaceEnvironment.getActor() and AutoPlaceEnvironment.getSource().
    Localization - Section in Overview

    next(int) - Method in class com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.util.XSTR
    Implementation of George Marsaglia's elegant Xorshift random generator 30% faster and better quality than the built-in java.util.random see also see http://www.javamex.com/tutorials/random_numbers/xorshift.shtml

    nextInt(int) - Method in class com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.util.XSTR
    Returns a pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value between 0 (inclusive) and the specified value (exclusive), drawn from this random number generator's sequence.

    withChannel(ItemStack, String) - Static method in class com.gtnewhorizon.structurelib.alignment.constructable.ChannelDataAccessor
